note: As-built set for the three v0.6.0 render fixes. flow = the render-edge pipeline with the shipped fix sites (FR1 light edge token; FR2 perpendicularizeEntry() shared helper on routeElbow; FR3 resolveLabelEdgeCollisions parallel-run escape), the byte-parity runtime twin, and the new generate-heroes.mjs + cache-lookup.mmd. sequence = the render call path through those fix points and its mirror in the interactive-export twin. before/ holds the plan-time as-is baseline for side-by-side compare.

diagrams.title: As-built: render-edge pipeline with FR1/FR2/FR3 fix sites + byte-parity twin + hero script
As-built: render call path through perpendicularizeEntry (FR2) + resolveLabelEdgeCollisions (FR3), mirrored in the runtime twin
